tone: High-energy, urgent, and exciting — creating a sense of FOMO
hook_formula: Scarcity and time pressure, emphasizing the limited availability of spots
cta_style: Direct and urgent, encouraging immediate action
visual_direction: Vibrant visuals, such as DJ announcements, crowd photos, or cocktail shots, with text overlays highlighting the scarcity and countdown
india_adjustment: Leverage WhatsApp and Instagram Stories for event-driven marketing, considering the high open rates and effectiveness of FOMO campaigns in the Indian market
dont: Avoid using low-energy visuals or tone
Never use language that implies abundance or plenty of time
